title: lolium atlantigenum
intro: Lolium atlantigenum, also known as Atlantic ryegrass or Lolium atlanticum, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds such as phenolic acids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lolium atlantigenum include potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties, as well as the ability to alleviate oxidative stress and inflammation. Lolium atlantigenum is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and extracts, which are traditionally used to support overall health and well-being.
